title: anisophyllum indicum
intro: Anisophyllum indicum, also known as Anisomeles malabarica, is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family, commonly found in tropical regions of Asia. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Anisophyllum indicum include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis, cough, and asthma, as well as its potential to lower fever and alleviate digestive problems. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including decoctions, infusions, and powdered extracts, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
